desc: Edits properties on an existing ParameterFilterElement — can rename the filter and/or reassign its category set.
summary: Edits properties on an existing ParameterFilterElement — can rename the filter and/or reassign its category set. Uses ListFilters.GetByName to resolve the filter from a user-supplied name. Categories are parsed from comma-separated BuiltInCategory enum names. Related: ListFilters for querying available filters.
usecase: User wants to rename a view filter or change which categories it applies to.
notfor: Creating new filters (use a create filter command). Not for view filter overrides.
precondition: Active document must be open. Target filter must exist by name.
postcondition: The filter element is renamed and/or has its categories updated.

outputs.name: Result
outputs.description: Filter edit result including id, name, categoryCount
